summary: Iteration 67: Tested new chat/messaging features and AI suggestion analysis. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Messages page with user search, 'Нов разговор' button, conversation list. Feedback page with AI Analysis section and 'Анализирай с AI' button working correctly.

issues: The review request mentions /chat route but actual route is /messages - this is just a documentation issue, not a bug

passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/users/search?q=Pet - returns user search results (found Petko)
✅ GET /api/users/search?q=a (1 char) - returns empty for short queries
✅ GET /api/conversations - returns conversation list with other_user info
✅ GET /api/messages/{conv_id} - returns messages for a conversation
✅ AI analysis is persisted and retrievable
✅ Landing page loads with 'Фирми и Майстори' in navbar
✅ User search input appears after clicking 'Нов разговор'
✅ Typing 'Pet' in search shows Petko as search result
✅ Suggestions tab shows AI Analysis section
✅ 'Анализирай с AI' button visible and functional
✅ AI analysis results displayed (from backend test)
critical_code_review_comments: 1. ✅ User search API (/api/users/search) works with authentication, min 2 chars
2. ✅ AI suggestion analysis using Emergent LLM Key + gpt-4o-mini works
3. ✅ Chat/Messages page has 'Нов разговор' button with user discovery
4. ✅ Feedback page has AI Analysis section with working button
Note: Route is /messages not /chat (documentation mismatch only)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_MSG messages between test users during API testing

Chat page route is /messages (not /chat). Test users: chat@test.bg and ivan@test.bg (both password: test123456). Petko user exists for search results.
